pr.title: [docs] Add troubleshooting for status bar truncation in managed sessions (#61732)
pr.body:
## Summary

Adds a troubleshooting entry for the status bar / status line being truncated when attached to a managed session from Claude Agents. The status line renders at full terminal width into a buffer, but the attached-session view applies a horizontal offset (for the 'attached' indicator) that clips the rendered output. The truncation occurs even at maximum terminal width.

This needs a code fix in the TUI layout engine ? the status line must render within the visible content area minus the managed-session viewport offset, not at raw terminal width. No workaround is available.

Closes #61732
pr.author: giruuuuj
